name: cockpit-caddy
description: Caddy reverse proxy management plugin for Cockpit
author: RXTX4816

scripts.build: mkdir -p src/assets && cp -r node_modules/@patternfly/react-core/dist/styles/assets/fonts node_modules/@patternfly/react-core/dist/styles/assets/pficon src/assets/ && node scripts/i18n-coverage.mjs && esbuild src/index.tsx --bundle --outfile=src/main.js --minify --target=es2020 --jsx=automatic --loader:.tsx=tsx --loader:.ts=ts --loader:.svg=dataurl --external:*.woff --external:*.woff2 --external:*.ttf --external:*.eot --external:*.png --external:*.jpg --external:*.gif
scripts.watch: mkdir -p src/assets && cp -r node_modules/@patternfly/react-core/dist/styles/assets/fonts node_modules/@patternfly/react-core/dist/styles/assets/pficon src/assets/ && esbuild src/index.tsx --bundle --outfile=src/main.js --target=es2020 --jsx=automatic --loader:.tsx=tsx --loader:.ts=ts --loader:.svg=dataurl --external:*.woff --external:*.woff2 --external:*.ttf --external:*.eot --external:*.png --external:*.jpg --external:*.gif --watch
